apply: Calculate the Laspeyres and Paasche price indexes using given data.
Construct a cost of living index using the given data and formula.
Apply the concept of index numbers in real-life economic scenarios.
analyze: Analyze the advantages and disadvantages of different types of index numbers.
Compare the performance of Laspeyres and Paasche indexes in different situations.
Evaluate the use of cost of living index in economic decision-making.
remember: Recall the definition and types of index numbers.
Identify the need for index numbers and their importance in economic analysis.
List the characteristics of a good index number.
understand: Understand the concept of price and quantity index numbers.
Explain the difference between Laspeyres and Paasche indexes.
Describe the construction of cost of living index.

ncert_objectives: Define and explain the need for index numbers.
Distinguish between different types of index numbers.
Explain the construction of Laspeyres and Paasche indexes.
Discuss the characteristics and limitations of index numbers.
board_exam_objectives: The student will be able to calculate Laspeyres and Paasche price indexes.
The student will be able to construct a cost of living index.
The student will be able to analyze the advantages and disadvantages of different types of index numbers.
